docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-04-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEXDEV CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF LAPIDOS LEUNG & FRANCIS INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JACK LADIDOS, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT NEXDEV CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAPIDOS, LEUNG & FRANCIS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEXDEV CORPORATION $4,010.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,075.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $4075 (INCLUDING COSTS). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,010.00 FILED BY LAPIDOS, LEUNG & FRANCIS INC AS TO DEFENDANT NEXDEV CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JACK LAPIDOS, PRESIDENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAPIDOS, LEUNG & FRANCIS INC
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAPIDOS, LEUNG & FRANCIS INC AS TO DEFENDANT NEXDEV CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2026 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAPIDOS, LEUNG & FRANCIS INC AS TO DEFENDANT NEXDEV CORPORATION
